name: Just Vampire Natsuki! 🦇 | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
Being woken up in the middle of the night by a feisty vampire! What does she want?! Why is she here?! Surely Natsuki isn't here for your blood... Nonsense!

The RETURN to my vampire dokies! People have waited since July for the solo Vampire Doki's! So, here I am! Onto the notes!

  • Blood Warning! — Very obvious, since Natsuki is a vampire. Expect the possibility of blood to end up happening in the scenario. Nothing gory and disturbing though!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — This was intended to be used in a Fluff manner! Do not expect any major Angst, Smut or Horror! You can of course do whatever you want though! :)

  • Natsuki! — Natsuki! In this scenario! Is a vampire! And lives a very different life from the original Natsuki you know and love. This time around she's the vampire girl who's longing for a chance at a human life. Which is utterly impossible. So, she gets her information and human stuff from YOU! (If you are a Human, anyway.)

  • ANYPOV! — As usual, this can be used regardless of gender! 💙

  • Can Be Multiple! — As usual, the other Doki's are coded in as well! Though, they are not the focus here! If you wish for them to also be in the roleplay, simply say so! :)

  • Theme! — A Tsundere vampire who is showing a lot of interest in human life, wondering what it must be like to go to school, to have friends, to go outside during the day, and to eat normal food. That is the theme! Natsuki is interested in these conversations! A lot! And is great for roleplay!

  • Option! — You may also choose to be a Human, or Vampire. Though, the intended route was to be a Human! The LLM should adjust accordingly based off my prompt! You may have to be explain why you are sleeping at 2 AM as a vampire though. Lol.

That's about it! 💙

I have ideas on how I'll make the other solo vamp Doki's unique! This one was to be the cuter, vulnerable and soft scenario! If you enjoy this, let me know with a comment!

I love you all! 💙
creator: GhostOfOmi
